name: Membership renewed
description: Documented POST success response for Club Membership Renewal — returns the renewed club membership number and its new end date (exact JSON example from Response Bodies, page 543).
notes: Resource definition at lines 20760-20848; response body schema "Club Membership Renewal" (page 543) at lines 28836-28858. CAVEATS: (1) Resource path available version is documented as 64.0 (URI params and request properties also 64.0), but the response-body property table lists fields as "Small, 63.0 / 63.0" — used 64.0 for `available` since that is the resource's documented Available version. (2) Request JSON example uses camelCase keys clubMembershipNumber/renewalPeriodType/renewalPeriod/notes/externalIdentifier and "OrderItemId" (capital O in the example), while the request Properties table names them clubMembershipNumber, renewalPeriod, renewalPeriodType, externalIdentifier, loyaltyMembershipNumber, notes, orderItemId (lowercase o), clubMembershipEndDate — kept the exact JSON-example casing for the fixture requestExample. (3) URI Parameters table calls them programName/clubName with Type "Integer" but the Resource path placeholders are ${loyaltyProgramName} and ${clubName} (Strings) — likely a doc inconsistency; used the path placeholders. (4) Success response JSON example shows only clubMembershipNumber + clubMembershipEndDate; status/message appear only in the property table (no example for the failure case in the doc), so the failure fixture is constructed from those documented properties, not a verbatim example. (5) Doc shows no explicit HTTP status codes; used 200 / 400 by convention. (6) No /services/data/vXX.X host prefix was shown for this specific resource — inserted /services/data/v64.0 to match the documented version per instructions.
